ddls:
CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the patient */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the patient */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the patient */,
  "marital_status_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient's marital status */,
  "gender_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient's gender */,
  "weight_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient's weight category */,
  "cholesterol" INTEGER /* Cholesterol level of the patient */,
  "stress_management" INTEGER /* Stress management practices (0 for no, 1 for yes) */,
  "trait_anxiety" INTEGER /* Trait anxiety level of the patient */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Patient's contact number */,
  "email" TEXT /* Patient's email address */,
  "address" TEXT /* Patient's home address */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the patient's emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the patient's emergency contact */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the patient */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the patient */,
  "blood_type" TEXT /* Blood type of the patient */,
  "allergies" TEXT /* List of patient's allergies */,
  "medical_record_number" TEXT /* Patient's unique medical record number */,
  "insurance_provider" TEXT /* Name of the patient's insurance provider */,
  "insurance_policy_number" TEXT /* Patient's insurance policy number */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patients_gender_id FOREIGN KEY ("gender_id") REFERENCES gender ("gender_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patients_marital_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("marital_status_id") REFERENCES marital_status ("marital_status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patients_weight_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("weight_category_id") REFERENCES weight_category ("weight_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "marital_status" (
  "marital_status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each marital status */,
  "marital_status_name" TEXT /* Name of the marital status (e.g., Single, Married, Divorced) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the marital status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("marital_status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gender" (
  "gender_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gender */,
  "gender_name" TEXT /* Name of the gender (e.g., Male, Female, Non-binary) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the gender */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gender_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weight_category" (
  "weight_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weight category */,
  "weight_category_name" TEXT /* Name of the weight category (e.g., Underweight, Normal, Overweight, Obese) */,
  "weight_range" TEXT /* Range of weight for the category (e.g., 0-18.5, 18.5-24.9) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the weight category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weight_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medical_appointments" (
  "appointment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each appointment */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient for the appointment */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* ID of the healthcare provider for the appointment */,
  "appointment_date" TEXT /* Date of the appointment */,
  "appointment_time" TEXT /* Time of the appointment */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the appointment */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes from the appointment */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the appointment */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the appointment */,
  "follow_up_required" INTEGER /* Indicates if a follow-up appointment is required */,
  "follow_up_date" TEXT /* Date for the follow-up appointment */,
  "appointment_status" TEXT /* Status of the appointment (e.g., Scheduled, Completed, Cancelled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("appointment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medical_appointments_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("provider_id") REFERENCES healthcare_providers ("provider_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medical_appointments_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "healthcare_providers" (
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each healthcare provider */,
  "provider_name" TEXT /* Full name of the healthcare provider */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the healthcare provider */,
  "specialty" TEXT /* Specialty of the healthcare provider (e.g., Cardiology, Psychology) */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the provider belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the healthcare provider */,
  "office_address" TEXT /* Office address of the healthcare provider */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* License number of the healthcare provider */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user role of the healthcare provider */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("provider_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_healthcare_providers_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_healthcare_providers_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department (e.g., Cardiology, Psychology, Nutrition) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location of the department */,
  "head_of_department" TEXT /* Name of the head of the department */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the department */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "treatment_plans" (
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each treatment plan */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient for the treatment plan */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* ID of the healthcare provider who created the plan */,
  "plan_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the treatment plan */,
  "plan_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the treatment plan */,
  "plan_details" TEXT /* Details of the treatment plan */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the treatment plan (e.g., Active, Completed, On Hold) */,
  "provider_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes from the provider about the treatment plan */,
  "patient_feedback" TEXT /* Feedback from the patient regarding the treatment plan */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the treatment plan was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_treatment_plans_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("provider_id") REFERENCES healthcare_providers ("provider_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_treatment_plans_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "treatment_plan_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each treatment plan item */,
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the treatment plan the item belongs to */,
  "item_description" TEXT /* Description of the treatment plan item */,
  "item_type" TEXT /* Type of the treatment plan item (e.g., Medication, Exercise, Therapy) */,
  "item_due_date" TEXT /* Due date for the treatment plan item */,
  "item_status" TEXT /* Status of the treatment plan item (e.g., Not Started, In Progress, Completed) */,
  "provider_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes from the provider about the treatment plan item */,
  "patient_feedback" TEXT /* Feedback from the patient regarding the treatment plan item */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the treatment plan item was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_treatment_plan_items_plan_id FOREIGN KEY ("plan_id") REFERENCES treatment_plans ("plan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medications" (
  "medication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medication */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient for the medication */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* ID of the healthcare provider who prescribed the medication */,
  "medication_name" TEXT /* Name of the medication */,
  "dosage" TEXT /* Dosage of the medication */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the medication (e.g., once daily, twice daily) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the medication */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the medication */,
  "prescription_notes" TEXT /* Notes or instructions for the medication */,
  "refills_remaining" INTEGER /* Number of refills remaining for the medication */,
  "last_refill_date" TEXT /* Date of the last refill */,
  "next_refill_due" TEXT /* Date when the next refill is due */,
  "patient_notes" TEXT /* Notes from the patient regarding the medication */,
  "provider_notes" TEXT /* Notes from the provider regarding the medication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("medication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medications_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("provider_id") REFERENCES healthcare_providers ("provider_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medications_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient history record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient for the history record */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Medical condition or disease */,
  "diagnosis_date" TEXT /* Date of diagnosis */,
  "treatment" TEXT /* Treatment received for the condition */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the treatment (e.g., Recovered, Ongoing) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments */,
  "family_history" TEXT /* Patient's family medical history */,
  "surgical_history" TEXT /* Patient's surgical history */,
  "allergies" TEXT /* Patient's allergies */,
  "immunizations" TEXT /* Patient's immunization history */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the patient history was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_history_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the user role (e.g., Admin, Doctor, Nurse) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the user role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* List of permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient whose data was accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Exact time when the data was accessed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the data was accessed */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used to access the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES healthcare_providers ("provider_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)
